channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Rays slugger Junior Caminero feels fortunate left hand not broken after he was hit in All-Star Game
item.description: Junior Caminero feared the worst when a 98 mph sinker that didn’t sink struck him in the left hand in the All-Star Game.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Hernando County family, community honor the life of 8-year-old girl killed in accident
item.description: Paisley Fratianni-Rollins was about to start third grade next month at J.D. Floyd Elementary School. Her family is now planning her funeral after a tragic accident.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Police search for men after St. Pete apartment building vandalized
item.description: St. Pete police are investigating a case of vandalism at a downtown apartment building over the weekend.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] New Pasco Fire Rescue station opens in Wesley Chapel, more facilities planned as county grows
item.description: Pasco County's rapid growth is driving major investments in emergency services. As the county's population has increased by 22% since 2020, Pasco Fire Rescue is expanding its footprint with new stations and modern facilities designed to improve response times and firefighter safety.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Mega Millions, Jackpot Triple Play results for July 14, 2026

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New York puts yearlong moratorium on new data centers, citing energy and climate risks
item.description: No large data centers can be built in New York for up to a year as the state creates rules to protect the environment and its energy grid from the power-hungry facilities.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Vandals cause $96K in damage at downtown St. Petersburg tower
item.description: Two men tore out landscaping lights and shattered windows at a downtown St. Petersburg residential tower, causing nearly $100,000 in damage, police said.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Pinellas schools ban smart glasses, tighten e-bike rules for students
item.description: Pinellas County students will face new rules this school year that ban smart glasses on campus and require e-bikes to remain outside school buildings.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 2 Tampa men accused of zip-tying 13-year-old during armed robbery
item.description: Two Tampa men face federal charges for allegedly breaking into an apartment complex with guns and zip-tying their victims, according to federal prosecutors.
